package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_subdomains: Oversized model structs that appear to merge multiple bounded contexts into one persistence shape.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule037NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule037NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule037NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario037Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule037NegativeService, input Rule037NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
